mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rpt_investment_daily ( stat_date, project_id, format_type, investment_manager_id, intention_count, intention_signed, new_intention, contract_count, contract_amount, contract_area, new_contract, conversion_rate, avg_rent_price, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{r.statDate}, #{r.projectId}, COALESCE(#{r.formatType}, ''), COALESCE(#{r.investmentManagerId}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.intentionCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.intentionSigned}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.newIntention}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.contractCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.contractAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.contractArea}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.newContract}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.conversionRate}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.avgRentPrice}, 0), 0, NOW(), 0, NOW(), 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE intention_count = VALUES(intention_count), intention_signed = VALUES(intention_signed), new_intention = VALUES(new_intention), contract_count = VALUES(contract_count), contract_amount = VALUES(contract_amount), contract_area = VALUES(contract_area), new_contract = VALUES(new_contract), conversion_rate = VALUES(conversion_rate), avg_rent_price = VALUES(avg_rent_price), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(stat_date) FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT * FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND format_type = '' AND investment_manager_id = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId}
ORDER BY project_id

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%u') DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m') CAST(YEAR(stat_date) AS CHAR) DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
AS timeDim, SUM(intention_count) AS intentionCount, SUM(intention_signed) AS intentionSigned, SUM(new_intention) AS newIntention, SUM(contract_count) AS contractCount, SUM(contract_amount) AS contractAmount, SUM(contract_area) AS contractArea, SUM(new_contract) AS newContract, /* 转化率 = contract_count / intention_count（防除零）*/ CASE WHEN SUM(intention_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(contract_count) / SUM(intention_count) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS conversionRate, /* 平均租金 = contract_amount / contract_area / 12（元/㎡/月，简化为年均）*/ CASE WHEN SUM(contract_area) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(contract_amount) / SUM(contract_area) / 12, 2) ELSE 0 END AS avgRentPrice FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND format_type = '' AND investment_manager_id = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId} AND format_type = #{formatType} AND investment_manager_id = #{managerId} AND stat_date >= #{startDate} AND stat_date <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%u') DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m') YEAR(stat_date) DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY timeDim ASC

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%u') DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m') CAST(YEAR(stat_date) AS CHAR) DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
AS timeDim, SUM(intention_count) AS intentionCount, SUM(intention_signed) AS intentionSigned, SUM(new_intention) AS newIntention, CASE WHEN SUM(intention_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(intention_signed) / SUM(intention_count) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS signedRate FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND format_type = '' AND investment_manager_id = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId} AND format_type = #{formatType} AND investment_manager_id = #{managerId} AND stat_date >= #{startDate} AND stat_date <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%u') DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m') YEAR(stat_date) DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY timeDim ASC

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%u') DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m') CAST(YEAR(stat_date) AS CHAR) DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
AS timeDim, SUM(contract_count) AS contractCount, SUM(contract_amount) AS contractAmount, SUM(contract_area) AS contractArea, SUM(new_contract) AS newContract, CASE WHEN SUM(intention_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(contract_count) / SUM(intention_count) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS conversionRate, CASE WHEN SUM(contract_area) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(contract_amount) / SUM(contract_area) / 12, 2) ELSE 0 END AS avgRentPrice FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND format_type = '' AND investment_manager_id = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId} AND format_type = #{formatType} AND investment_manager_id = #{managerId} AND stat_date >= #{startDate} AND stat_date <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%u') DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m') YEAR(stat_date) DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY timeDim ASC

SELECT SUM(intention_count) AS intentionCount, SUM(intention_signed) AS intentionSigned, SUM(contract_count) AS contractCount, SUM(contract_amount) AS contractAmount, SUM(contract_area) AS contractArea FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND format_type = '' AND investment_manager_id = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT project_id AS projectId, format_type AS formatType, investment_manager_id AS investmentManagerId, avg_rent_price AS avgRentPrice, contract_area AS contractArea, contract_amount AS contractAmount, contract_count AS contractCount FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND format_type != '' /* 只取业态维度行 */ AND investment_manager_id = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId} AND investment_manager_id = #{managerId}
ORDER BY avg_rent_price DESC

SELECT project_id AS projectId, format_type AS formatType, contract_count AS contractCount, contract_area AS contractArea, contract_amount AS contractAmount, avg_rent_price AS avgRentPrice, conversion_rate AS conversionRate, new_intention AS newIntention, new_contract AS newContract FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND format_type != '' AND investment_manager_id = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId}
ORDER BY project_id, contract_amount DESC

SELECT format_type AS formatType, project_id AS projectId, SUM(contract_count) AS contractCount, SUM(contract_area) AS contractArea, SUM(contract_amount) AS contractAmount, /* 加权平均租金单价 */ CASE WHEN SUM(contract_area) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(contract_amount) / SUM(contract_area) / 12, 2) ELSE 0 END AS avgRentPrice, /* 转化率 */ CASE WHEN SUM(intention_count) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(contract_count) / SUM(intention_count) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS conversionRate FROM rpt_investment_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate} AND format_type != '' /* 按业态维度 */ AND investment_manager_id = 0 AND project_id = #{projectId}
GROUP BY format_type, project_id ORDER BY SUM(contract_count) DESC
